prompt: In Mail, mute a conversation/thread (Message menu > Mute, or right-click > Mute). Pick any inbox conversation, or one whose subject contains 'KinBench 153' if such a seed exists. After acting, write 'muted' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/153-mute-confirm.txt — the eval's paper trail because muted state isn't reliably queryable via AppleScript.
